description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular design with a predominantly matte gray finish and black accents, giving it a tactical and modern appearance. The body is constructed with multiple geometric panels, suggesting reinforced metal or polymer materials, and includes a prominent handguard and a large, ergonomic pistol grip. The upper section houses a rail system, likely for mounting optics or accessories, and the rear features a fixed, solid stock for stability. The magazine is box-shaped and appears detachable, positioned just ahead of the trigger assembly. The barrel is relatively short and thick, with a simple cylindrical muzzle device at the front. Small yellow highlights and subtle detailing add to the visual complexity, making it suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a matte gray and black finish, featuring a rail system, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine. Its robust build and detailed design make it ideal for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel end, rail system, and the compact, symmetrical profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the fixed stock, rail system, detachable magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid stock and the alignment of the upper rail, with minimal detail on the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the magazine, grip, and detailed paneling on the rifle body.
